title: CropProperties
description: The crop properties of an image.

offsetLeft.description: The offset from the left edge, as a fraction of the image width.

offsetRight.description: The offset from the right edge, as a fraction of the image width.

offsetTop.description: The offset from the top edge, as a fraction of the image height.

offsetBottom.description: The offset from the bottom edge, as a fraction of the image height.

angle.description: The clockwise rotation angle of the crop rectangle.
